name: Goku vs Venom: Null Void Showdown
description: A cross-universe duel in Ben 10's Null Void: Son Goku versus Venom on a drifting battlefield of wreckage and unstable gravity.
author: Genesis Infinity

plotPoints.name: The Shard Collapses
plotPoints.description: The Suspended Shard's gravity anomaly finally gives out - the moon fragment starts breaking apart, showering the battlefield with debris.

plotPoints.name: Symbiote Frenzy
plotPoints.description: If Venom's hit points ever fall below half, the symbiote panics and takes full control, fighting with feral abandon.
plotPoints.trigger: Venom's current hit points fall below half of maximum

effects.name: Disoriented
effects.description: Thrown off balance by a sudden gravity flicker.

effects.name: Kamehameha Blast
effects.description: Struck head-on by a concentrated beam of ki.

effects.name: Bite Wound
effects.description: Punctured by the symbiote's fanged maw.

items.name: Senzu Bean
items.description: A single bean that undoes exhaustion and closes wounds almost instantly.

items.name: Salvaged Plating
items.description: Hull plating torn from the wreckage field and bound to the body with symbiote mass.
